notes: Simple mode remains the default, with expert mode available via expert=1
Provider VLESS profiles are visible in simple mode and can be selected from HY2
VPN / Profiles overlay now includes provider VLESS entries with check/select actions
Selection still uses the backend safe select flow with real proxy check and rollback
Hysteria2 diagnostics and duplicate-user checks remain visible in health output
Bootstrap and update package target Keenetic/Netcraze Viva deployments with Entware
